TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Saikoray a mifelihay analal a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" a analal == 1990 miheca saka 3 folad a onto no mitiliday, toya na mihecaan o pikomodan a kasakapot no mitiliday a onto, padoedo ira ko miliyangay to ni Hao Bocon a pikomod to "mifelihay to pikapot no sofitay" a demak, saka tala'ayaw no cifana'ay a kasakapotan, tangasa 1991 mihecaan masadak konini a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" a analal i, onini a malitosaay a 'icel miliyaw mapapolong ko syakay onto toya mihecaan a mifelih to piri'ang no sician a onto a demak. Mapalowad konini a tata'angay miliyangay onto a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" a analal, itira i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, naitiya a romi'ad a analal miteka, nawhani caay ka songila' ko pidemak no Komintang, saka manayar ko piliyang a demak tangasa i 5 folad 20 romi'ad, ira ko 12 romi'adan, masalalowadan, o sito a kasakomod micalap to syataw no cilamalay i Taypi 5 ko romi'ad ko lafin. Masamitiniay ko demak i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad i 5:50 ko toki to dafak, o mipolitaay (Tiyawcaci) micokeray a kakeridan ci Gao Minghui ko citodongay, misitapang a pakilinikay ko pirepet a demak. Taypisi a Tiwcaco, Taypisien Tiwcacan, Sincosi Tiwcacan, Takaosi Tiwcaco sepatay Tiwcaci la'enoay citodongay, itini ni Gao Minghui a piceling, malecad ko enemay kaitiraan ko pidemak. Itira cangra i Taypici mirepet ci Chen Zhengranan, micomod i Sincu Tsinghua daykako fa'inayan sikosya miala ci Liao Weichengan, itira i Singtien mirepet ci Wang Xiuhuian, itira i Takaosi mirepat ci Masao Nikaran. Nanoya, onini sasepatay halomisolapay mirepet a citodongay minikiw to maamaan tilidan itiya mipatayra i Taypisi Tiwcacu. O sakasaan no Tiawcaci: o mamicowat to selal i kitakit ko nipatirengan ni Shi Ming ni Dipong a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a yafayof" o sanay, saka i saka pitekaan no saka 5 folad, masapinangay to no Tiawcaci konini a sakapot to dademaken saan, laloma'an a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" o mamitelek to dademakwn, malaheciay to ko pirina to sapisinting, palilan i kasaniyaro'. O sowal ni Gao Minghui: "Caacaay aca papipasadaken tonini a sapisinting ato sapacipat." saan. So'elinay, mafelih aca a saka tata'ang no demak. Pasowal ci Gao Minghui: "Toya 'ayaw no lahok, itira kako i Taypisi Tiawcacu a mi'eses, caay pitolas ko tingwa." Sa'elinay, toya 'ayaw no lahok, ranikay sa makerih ko singsi mitiliday no Tsinghua daykako. Kalahokan to, mipatireng ko mitiliday to "Ni Liao Weicheng micokeray yofayof" i pitilidan a mirarakat, mi'ang'ang pakokot to picomod i pitilidan mirepet to tamdaw; herek no lahok, itiya pasayra to i Sinwenci, Lifayin, Taypi tiawcaccu to piliyang. Dadaya to, mincintang a Lifawuyin ci Lu Xiuyi, Hong Qichang aci Zheng Yuzheng, patihi to hakasi, yinciw no Tsing Hua daykako ato dayhiw no mitiliday tayra i Taypisi Tiawcacu miai to tamdaw, malaliyang aci Gao Minghuian, awaay ko padepocan, pinaay semo^otay a mitiliday ato finawlan itira i fawahan no Taypisi Tiawcacu mipacipat to tilid, miteleng to kiladom a miliyang. "Polong no kitakit a mitiliday a kasakapot" ka'amisay sa'etal a kakeridan ato Taywan daykako a todong "Mitelekay to kimpo kasakapot" a tamdaw ira tayra mikihatiya micikeroh. Saka tosa romi'ad, miteka to dadahal ko na demak. Kasa pitilidan misatapang a macowat ko midamaay tona onto, oya hakasi no Tsinghua daykako malalikid nikapolongan mipangangan a miketer to "Masedafay faloco' micaliw to mapatayay patiko to salo'afang", toya romi'ad salaloma'an no pitilidan, papotalay no pitilidan 80 hakasi malalikid mipangangan to sapicoker. Cense, Taywan hakasi yofayof, Skakaay kingkiwyin a kasakapot mikingkiway, misetek to "mifelihay to sofitay a pikowan" pakayraan, malakapot to ponkaan mapolong miliyang. I 12 romi'ad, "Kapolongan miliyangay pikari'ang no sician nikapolongan" a mitiliday, talifahal sa micomod i Congcenmiaw, ira ko mamo^etepay a hakasi tayra mipadama. Nika, herek no lahok to limaay ko widi, maocor ko imeng milaplap, oya 'alomanay ca Chen Shimeng mata'elifay ko tosa polo' a hakasi mapekpek no imeng. Dadaya sato, miocor haca ko KMT to imeng matatoy to sapekpek a mipalo to hakasi mitiliday. Onini kinatosaay pipekpek no imeng a demakan, malengat a sangotefoh sato ko polong no syakay, makacifana'ay mipatireng to "makafana'ay mifelih pikari'ang no sivian nikapolongan", miketon i saka 520 romi'ad a mirakatay a piliyang. 13 romi'ad, kasasiked rarawraw to ko pitilidan ala'ecaay to pitilid. 28 a singsi no Tsing Hua daykako i herek no lahok pasadak to "pakaniraay ko pinanam, awaay ko raraw no harateng" sanay pipaterep pitilid a ontio. I 14 romi'ad, Mincintang ato Sincawliw ko mikeriday to syakay misetek to sapikapot midama. Ci Gao Minghui itiya i 13 romi'ad pihapiwan, miliyas to micokeray Tiawcaci a todong, nika caay to ko mamafasaw konini lalengatan demak. Itiya i 15 romi'ad herek no lahok 2 ko widi, o Tsinghua daykako "micokeray ci Liao Weichengan" singsi mitiliday 300 ko tamdaw ato "polongan mitiliday sakapot" a mitiliday 800 ko tamdaw, talafahal sa cidemak micalap to syataw no kasoling no Taypisi, misatakaraw micikeroh to piliyangan, tangasa i 20 romi'ad. Itiya 16 romi'ad, Lifayin mitamoray pasadak to palasawad to "Mitefoc to miraraway telekan (Cence panloan tiyawli)" a analal, nika, itiya cidemak haca ko misolapay tayra i Jiaotong daykako mihokhokay a demak, mapataraw haca ko piliyangan a demak, makedec aca ko 520 pirakatan miliyang a pa'icel. Ikor i, tadamanay hakasi ca Yu Yingshi, Li Yuanzhe, Du Weiming mikihatiya to pipangangan. O sapipalasawadaw to kohecalay katalawan, palasawad to misatekeday a latiih rikec, caayay kaciraraw mapasadak koya 4 a kapah, miliyas ko mikedecay to pitilidan sanay a salongoc a mirarakat, itiya 20 romi'ad ira ko 4 'ofad no tamdaw ko mikihatiyaay. O Lifayin itiya 21 romi'ad mihayda mipalasawad to "Mitefoc to miraraway telekan (Cence panloan tiyawli)" a analal, i 24 romi'ad mihayda palasawad to "Pitefoc to sepay telek". Padoedo, oya 100 liyad a sarikec, pakayra ko hoyin midotoc tonini a rikec saki "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" a analal sa 4 a mipakokotan o nipacorodan no kapolongan awaay to ko patodongan a mapalasawaday to.
S.PHON: == saiko~uraj a mifəɾiħaj anaɾaɾ a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" a anaɾaɾ == **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a o~unto~u no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, to~uja na miħəʦaan o~u piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kasakapo~ut no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a o~unto~u, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ira ko~u miɾijaŋaj to~u ni ħao~u b~b~vo~uʦo~un a piko~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u "mifəɾiħaj to~u pikapo~ut no~u so~ufitaj" a ɬ~ɮəmak, saka taɾaʡajaw no~u ʦifanaʡaj a kasakapo~utan, taŋasa **** miħəʦaan masaɬ~ɮak ko~unini a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" a anaɾaɾ i, o~unini a maɾito~usaaj a ʡiʦəɾ miɾijaw mapapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u sjakaj o~unto~u to~uja miħəʦaan a mifəɾiħ to~u piriʡaŋ no~u siʦian a o~unto~u a ɬ~ɮəmak. mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~unini a tataʡaŋaj miɾijaŋaj o~unto~u a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" a anaɾaɾ, itira i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, naitija a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a anaɾaɾ mitəka, nawħani ʦaaj ka so~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak no~u ko~umintaŋ, saka manajar ko~u piɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak taŋasa i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, masaɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan, o~u sito~u a kasako~umo~uɬ~ɮ miʦaɾap to~u sjataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i tajpi * ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾafin. masamitiniaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i *:** ko~u to~uki to~u ɬ~ɮafak, o~u mipo~uɾitaaj (tijawʦaʦi) miʦo~ukəraj a kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, misitapaŋ a pakiɾinikaj ko~u pirəpət a ɬ~ɮəmak. tajpisi a tiwʦaʦo~u, tajpisiən tiwʦaʦan, sinʦo~usi tiwʦaʦan, takao~usi tiwʦaʦo~u səpataj tiwʦaʦi ɾaʡəno~uaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, itini ni *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui a piʦəɾiŋ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ənəmaj kaitiraan ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak. itira ʦaŋra i tajpiʦi mirəpət ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋranan, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i sinʦo~u~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u faʡinajan siko~usja miaɾa ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋan, itira i siŋtiən mirəpət ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~uian, itira i takao~usi mirəpat ʦi masao~u nikaran. nano~uja, o~unini sasəpataj ħaɾo~umiso~uɾapaj mirəpət a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj minikiw to~u maamaan tiɾiɬ~ɮan itija mipatajra i tajpisi tiwʦaʦo~u~u. o~u sakasaan no~u tiawʦaʦi: o~u mamiʦo~uwat to~u səɾaɾ i kitakit ko~u nipatirəŋan ni sħi miŋ ni ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a jafajo~uf" o~u sanaj, saka i saka pitəkaan no~u saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, masapinaŋaj to~u no~u tiawʦaʦi ko~unini a sakapo~ut to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən saan, ɾaɾo~umaʡan a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" o~u mamitəɾək to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakwn, maɾaħəʦiaj to~u ko~u pirina to~u sapisintiŋ, paɾiɾan i kasanijaro~uʡ. o~u so~uwaɾ ni *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui: "ʦaaʦaaj aʦa papipasaɬ~ɮakən to~unini a sapisintiŋ ato~u sapaʦipat." saan. so~uʡəɾinaj, mafəɾiħ aʦa a saka tataʡaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. paso~uwaɾ ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui: "to~uja ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, itira kako~u i tajpisi tiawʦaʦo~u~u a miʡəsəs, ʦaaj pito~uɾas ko~u tiŋwa." saʡəɾinaj, to~uja ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, ranikaj sa makəriħ ko~u siŋsi mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u. kaɾaħo~ukan to~u, mipatirəŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u "ni ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ miʦo~ukəraj jo~ufajo~uf" i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a mirarakat, miʡaŋʡaŋ pako~uko~ut to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mirəpət to~u tamɬ~ɮaw; ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk, itija pasajra to~u i sinwənʦi, ɾifajin, tajpi tiawʦaʦʦo~u~u to~u piɾijaŋ. ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja to~u, minʦintaŋ a ɾifawo~u~ujin ʦi ɾo~u~u xio~u~uji, ħo~uŋ *iʦħaŋ aʦi *ħəŋ jo~u~u*ħəŋ, patiħi to~u ħakasi, jinʦiw no~u tsiŋ ħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u ato~u ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj tajra i tajpisi tiawʦaʦo~u~u miai to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, maɾaɾijaŋ aʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~uian, awaaj ko~u paɬ~ɮəpo~uʦan, pinaaj səmo~uʔo~utaj a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u finawɾan itira i fawaħan no~u tajpisi tiawʦaʦo~u~u mipaʦipat to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, mitəɾəŋ to~u kiɾaɬ~ɮo~um a miɾijaŋ. "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a kasakapo~ut" kaʡamisaj saʡətaɾ a kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ "mitəɾəkaj to~u kimpo~u kasakapo~ut" a tamɬ~ɮaw ira tajra mikiħatija miʦikəro~uħ. saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mitəka to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ ko~u na ɬ~ɮəmak. kasa pitiɾiɬ~ɮan misatapaŋ a maʦo~uwat ko~u miɬ~ɮamaaj to~una o~unto~u, o~uja ħakasi no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ nikapo~uɾo~uŋan mipaŋaŋan a mikətər to~u "masəɬ~ɮafaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miʦaɾiw to~u mapatajaj patiko~u to~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ", to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, papo~utaɾaj no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ** ħakasi maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ mipaŋaŋan to~u sapiʦo~ukər. ʦənsə, tajwan ħakasi jo~ufajo~uf, skakaaj kiŋkiwjin a kasakapo~ut mikiŋkiwaj, misətək to~u "mifəɾiħaj to~u so~ufitaj a piko~uwan" pakajraan, maɾakapo~ut to~u po~unkaan mapo~uɾo~uŋ miɾijaŋ. i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, "kapo~uɾo~uŋan miɾijaŋaj pikariʡaŋ no~u siʦian nikapo~uɾo~uŋan" a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, taɾifaħaɾ sa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦo~uŋʦənmiaw, ira ko~u mamo~uʔətəpaj a ħakasi tajra mipaɬ~ɮama. nika, ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk to~u ɾimaaj ko~u wiɬ~ɮi, mao~uʦo~ur ko~u iməŋ miɾapɾap, o~uja ʡaɾo~umanaj ʦa ʦħən sħiməŋ mataʡəɾifaj ko~u to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ a ħakasi mapəkpək no~u iməŋ. ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja sato~u, mio~uʦo~ur ħaʦa ko~u kmt to~u iməŋ matato~uj to~u sapəkpək a mipaɾo~u to~u ħakasi mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj. o~unini kinato~usaaj pipəkpək no~u iməŋ a ɬ~ɮəmakan, maɾəŋat a saŋo~utəfo~uħ sato~u ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sjakaj, makaʦifanaʡaj mipatirəŋ to~u "makafanaʡaj mifəɾiħ pikariʡaŋ no~u sib~vian nikapo~uɾo~uŋan", mikəto~un i saka *** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a mirakataj a piɾijaŋ. ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kasasikəɬ~ɮ rarawraw to~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan aɾaʡəʦaaj to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ. ** a siŋsi no~u tsiŋ ħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "pakaniraaj ko~u pinanam, awaaj ko~u raraw no~u ħaratəŋ" sanaj pipatərəp pitiɾiɬ~ɮ a o~untio~u. i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, minʦintaŋ ato~u sinʦawɾiw ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u sjakaj misətək to~u sapikapo~ut miɬ~ɮama. ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui itija i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ piħapiwan, miɾijas to~u miʦo~ukəraj tiawʦaʦi a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, nika ʦaaj to~u ko~u mamafasaw ko~unini ɾaɾəŋatan ɬ~ɮəmak. itija i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk * ko~u wiɬ~ɮi, o~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u "miʦo~ukəraj ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋan" siŋsi mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u "po~uɾo~uŋan mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj sakapo~ut" a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, taɾafaħaɾ sa ʦiɬ~ɮəmak miʦaɾap to~u sjataw no~u kaso~uɾiŋ no~u tajpisi, misatakaraw miʦikəro~uħ to~u piɾijaŋan, taŋasa i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. itija ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin mitamo~uraj pasaɬ~ɮak to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "mitəfo~uʦ to~u mirarawaj təɾəkan (ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tijawɾi)" a anaɾaɾ, nika, itija ʦiɬ~ɮəmak ħaʦa ko~u miso~uɾapaj tajra i *iao~uto~uŋ ɬ~ɮajkako~u miħo~ukħo~ukaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, mapataraw ħaʦa ko~u piɾijaŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak, makəɬ~ɮəʦ aʦa ko~u *** pirakatan miɾijaŋ a paʡiʦəɾ. iko~ur i, taɬ~ɮamanaj ħakasi ʦa jo~u~u jiŋsħi, ɾi jo~u~uan*ħə, ɬ~ɮo~u~u wəimiŋ mikiħatija to~u pipaŋaŋan. o~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮaw to~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan, paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj a ɾatiiħ rikəʦ, ʦaajaj kaʦiraraw mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~uja * a kapaħ, miɾijas ko~u mikəɬ~ɮəʦaj to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan sanaj a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a mirarakat, itija ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u * ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mikiħatijaaj. o~u ɾifajin itija ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħajɬ~ɮa mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "mitəfo~uʦ to~u mirarawaj təɾəkan (ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tijawɾi)" a anaɾaɾ, i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħajɬ~ɮa paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "pitəfo~uʦ to~u səpaj təɾək". paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u, o~uja *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a sarikəʦ, pakajra ko~u ħo~ujin miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~unini a rikəʦ saki "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" a anaɾaɾ sa * a mipako~uko~utan o~u nipaʦo~uro~uɬ~ɮan no~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan awaaj to~u ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u.
S.FORM: == Saikoray a mifelihay analal a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" a analal == 1990 miheca saka 3 folad a onto no mitiliday, toya na mihecaan o pikomodan a kasakapot no mitiliday a onto, padoedo ira ko miliyangay to ni Hao Bocon a pikomod to "mifelihay to pikapot no sofitay" a demak, saka tala'ayaw no cifana'ay a kasakapotan, tangasa 1991 mihecaan masadak konini a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" a analal i, onini a malitosaay a 'icel miliyaw mapapolong ko syakay onto toya mihecaan a mifelih to piri'ang no sician a onto a demak. Mapalowad konini a tata'angay miliyangay onto a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" a analal, itira i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, naitiya a romi'ad a analal miteka, nawhani caay ka songila' ko pidemak no Komintang, saka manayar ko piliyang a demak tangasa i 5 folad 20 romi'ad, ira ko 12 romi'adan, masalalowadan, o sito a kasakomod micalap to syataw no cilamalay i Taypi 5 ko romi'ad ko lafin. Masamitiniay ko demak i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad i 5:50 ko toki to dafak, o mipolitaay (Tiyawcaci) micokeray a kakeridan ci Gao Minghui ko citodongay, misitapang a pakilinikay ko pirepet a demak. Taypisi a Tiwcaco, Taypisien Tiwcacan, Sincosi Tiwcacan, Takaosi Tiwcaco sepatay Tiwcaci la'enoay citodongay, itini ni Gao Minghui a piceling, malecad ko enemay kaitiraan ko pidemak. Itira cangra i Taypici mirepet ci Chen Zhengranan, micomod i Sincu Tsinghua daykako fa'inayan sikosya miala ci Liao Weichengan, itira i Singtien mirepet ci Wang Xiuhuian, itira i Takaosi mirepat ci Masao Nikaran. Nanoya, onini sasepatay halomisolapay mirepet a citodongay minikiw to maamaan tilidan itiya mipatayra i Taypisi Tiwcacu. O sakasaan no Tiawcaci: o mamicowat to selal i kitakit ko nipatirengan ni Shi Ming ni Dipong a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a yafayof" o sanay, saka i saka pitekaan no saka 5 folad, masapinangay to no Tiawcaci konini a sakapot to dademaken saan, laloma'an a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" o mamitelek to dademakwn, malaheciay to ko pirina to sapisinting, palilan i kasaniyaro'. O sowal ni Gao Minghui: "Caacaay aca papipasadaken tonini a sapisinting ato sapacipat." saan. So'elinay, mafelih aca a saka tata'ang no demak. Pasowal ci Gao Minghui: "Toya 'ayaw no lahok, itira kako i Taypisi Tiawcacu a mi'eses, caay pitolas ko tingwa." Sa'elinay, toya 'ayaw no lahok, ranikay sa makerih ko singsi mitiliday no Tsinghua daykako. Kalahokan to, mipatireng ko mitiliday to "Ni Liao Weicheng micokeray yofayof" i pitilidan a mirarakat, mi'ang'ang pakokot to picomod i pitilidan mirepet to tamdaw; herek no lahok, itiya pasayra to i Sinwenci, Lifayin, Taypi tiawcaccu to piliyang. Dadaya to, mincintang a Lifawuyin ci Lu Xiuyi, Hong Qichang aci Zheng Yuzheng, patihi to hakasi, yinciw no Tsing Hua daykako ato dayhiw no mitiliday tayra i Taypisi Tiawcacu miai to tamdaw, malaliyang aci Gao Minghuian, awaay ko padepocan, pinaay semo^otay a mitiliday ato finawlan itira i fawahan no Taypisi Tiawcacu mipacipat to tilid, miteleng to kiladom a miliyang. "Polong no kitakit a mitiliday a kasakapot" ka'amisay sa'etal a kakeridan ato Taywan daykako a todong "Mitelekay to kimpo kasakapot" a tamdaw ira tayra mikihatiya micikeroh. Saka tosa romi'ad, miteka to dadahal ko na demak. Kasa pitilidan misatapang a macowat ko midamaay tona onto, oya hakasi no Tsinghua daykako malalikid nikapolongan mipangangan a miketer to "Masedafay faloco' micaliw to mapatayay patiko to salo'afang", toya romi'ad salaloma'an no pitilidan, papotalay no pitilidan 80 hakasi malalikid mipangangan to sapicoker. Cense, Taywan hakasi yofayof, Skakaay kingkiwyin a kasakapot mikingkiway, misetek to "mifelihay to sofitay a pikowan" pakayraan, malakapot to ponkaan mapolong miliyang. I 12 romi'ad, "Kapolongan miliyangay pikari'ang no sician nikapolongan" a mitiliday, talifahal sa micomod i Congcenmiaw, ira ko mamo^etepay a hakasi tayra mipadama. Nika, herek no lahok to limaay ko widi, maocor ko imeng milaplap, oya 'alomanay ca Chen Shimeng mata'elifay ko tosa polo' a hakasi mapekpek no imeng. Dadaya sato, miocor haca ko KMT to imeng matatoy to sapekpek a mipalo to hakasi mitiliday. Onini kinatosaay pipekpek no imeng a demakan, malengat a sangotefoh sato ko polong no syakay, makacifana'ay mipatireng to "makafana'ay mifelih pikari'ang no sivian nikapolongan", miketon i saka 520 romi'ad a mirakatay a piliyang. 13 romi'ad, kasasiked rarawraw to ko pitilidan ala'ecaay to pitilid. 28 a singsi no Tsing Hua daykako i herek no lahok pasadak to "pakaniraay ko pinanam, awaay ko raraw no harateng" sanay pipaterep pitilid a ontio. I 14 romi'ad, Mincintang ato Sincawliw ko mikeriday to syakay misetek to sapikapot midama. Ci Gao Minghui itiya i 13 romi'ad pihapiwan, miliyas to micokeray Tiawcaci a todong, nika caay to ko mamafasaw konini lalengatan demak. Itiya i 15 romi'ad herek no lahok 2 ko widi, o Tsinghua daykako "micokeray ci Liao Weichengan" singsi mitiliday 300 ko tamdaw ato "polongan mitiliday sakapot" a mitiliday 800 ko tamdaw, talafahal sa cidemak micalap to syataw no kasoling no Taypisi, misatakaraw micikeroh to piliyangan, tangasa i 20 romi'ad. Itiya 16 romi'ad, Lifayin mitamoray pasadak to palasawad to "Mitefoc to miraraway telekan (Cence panloan tiyawli)" a analal, nika, itiya cidemak haca ko misolapay tayra i Jiaotong daykako mihokhokay a demak, mapataraw haca ko piliyangan a demak, makedec aca ko 520 pirakatan miliyang a pa'icel. Ikor i, tadamanay hakasi ca Yu Yingshi, Li Yuanzhe, Du Weiming mikihatiya to pipangangan. O sapipalasawadaw to kohecalay katalawan, palasawad to misatekeday a latiih rikec, caayay kaciraraw mapasadak koya 4 a kapah, miliyas ko mikedecay to pitilidan sanay a salongoc a mirarakat, itiya 20 romi'ad ira ko 4 'ofad no tamdaw ko mikihatiyaay. O Lifayin itiya 21 romi'ad mihayda mipalasawad to "Mitefoc to miraraway telekan (Cence panloan tiyawli)" a analal, i 24 romi'ad mihayda palasawad to "Pitefoc to sepay telek". Padoedo, oya 100 liyad a sarikec, pakayra ko hoyin midotoc tonini a rikec saki "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof" a analal sa 4 a mipakokotan o nipacorodan no kapolongan awaay to ko patodongan a mapalasawaday to.
S.PHON: == saiko~uraj a mifəɾiħaj anaɾaɾ a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" a anaɾaɾ == **** miħəʦa saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ a o~unto~u no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, to~uja na miħəʦaan o~u piko~umo~uɬ~ɮan a kasakapo~ut no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a o~unto~u, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ira ko~u miɾijaŋaj to~u ni ħao~u b~b~vo~uʦo~un a piko~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~u "mifəɾiħaj to~u pikapo~ut no~u so~ufitaj" a ɬ~ɮəmak, saka taɾaʡajaw no~u ʦifanaʡaj a kasakapo~utan, taŋasa **** miħəʦaan masaɬ~ɮak ko~unini a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" a anaɾaɾ i, o~unini a maɾito~usaaj a ʡiʦəɾ miɾijaw mapapo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u sjakaj o~unto~u to~uja miħəʦaan a mifəɾiħ to~u piriʡaŋ no~u siʦian a o~unto~u a ɬ~ɮəmak. mapaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ ko~unini a tataʡaŋaj miɾijaŋaj o~unto~u a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" a anaɾaɾ, itira i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, naitija a ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a anaɾaɾ mitəka, nawħani ʦaaj ka so~uŋiɾaʡ ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak no~u ko~umintaŋ, saka manajar ko~u piɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak taŋasa i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, masaɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan, o~u sito~u a kasako~umo~uɬ~ɮ miʦaɾap to~u sjataw no~u ʦiɾamaɾaj i tajpi * ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ko~u ɾafin. masamitiniaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i *:** ko~u to~uki to~u ɬ~ɮafak, o~u mipo~uɾitaaj (tijawʦaʦi) miʦo~ukəraj a kakəriɬ~ɮan ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui ko~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, misitapaŋ a pakiɾinikaj ko~u pirəpət a ɬ~ɮəmak. tajpisi a tiwʦaʦo~u, tajpisiən tiwʦaʦan, sinʦo~usi tiwʦaʦan, takao~usi tiwʦaʦo~u səpataj tiwʦaʦi ɾaʡəno~uaj ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj, itini ni *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui a piʦəɾiŋ, maɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ko~u ənəmaj kaitiraan ko~u piɬ~ɮəmak. itira ʦaŋra i tajpiʦi mirəpət ʦi ʦħən *ħəŋranan, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i sinʦo~u~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u faʡinajan siko~usja miaɾa ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋan, itira i siŋtiən mirəpət ʦi waŋ xio~u~uħo~u~uian, itira i takao~usi mirəpat ʦi masao~u nikaran. nano~uja, o~unini sasəpataj ħaɾo~umiso~uɾapaj mirəpət a ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj minikiw to~u maamaan tiɾiɬ~ɮan itija mipatajra i tajpisi tiwʦaʦo~u~u. o~u sakasaan no~u tiawʦaʦi: o~u mamiʦo~uwat to~u səɾaɾ i kitakit ko~u nipatirəŋan ni sħi miŋ ni ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a jafajo~uf" o~u sanaj, saka i saka pitəkaan no~u saka * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, masapinaŋaj to~u no~u tiawʦaʦi ko~unini a sakapo~ut to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakən saan, ɾaɾo~umaʡan a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" o~u mamitəɾək to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakwn, maɾaħəʦiaj to~u ko~u pirina to~u sapisintiŋ, paɾiɾan i kasanijaro~uʡ. o~u so~uwaɾ ni *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui: "ʦaaʦaaj aʦa papipasaɬ~ɮakən to~unini a sapisintiŋ ato~u sapaʦipat." saan. so~uʡəɾinaj, mafəɾiħ aʦa a saka tataʡaŋ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak. paso~uwaɾ ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui: "to~uja ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, itira kako~u i tajpisi tiawʦaʦo~u~u a miʡəsəs, ʦaaj pito~uɾas ko~u tiŋwa." saʡəɾinaj, to~uja ʡajaw no~u ɾaħo~uk, ranikaj sa makəriħ ko~u siŋsi mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u. kaɾaħo~ukan to~u, mipatirəŋ ko~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj to~u "ni ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋ miʦo~ukəraj jo~ufajo~uf" i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan a mirarakat, miʡaŋʡaŋ pako~uko~ut to~u piʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mirəpət to~u tamɬ~ɮaw; ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk, itija pasajra to~u i sinwənʦi, ɾifajin, tajpi tiawʦaʦʦo~u~u to~u piɾijaŋ. ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja to~u, minʦintaŋ a ɾifawo~u~ujin ʦi ɾo~u~u xio~u~uji, ħo~uŋ *iʦħaŋ aʦi *ħəŋ jo~u~u*ħəŋ, patiħi to~u ħakasi, jinʦiw no~u tsiŋ ħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u ato~u ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj tajra i tajpisi tiawʦaʦo~u~u miai to~u tamɬ~ɮaw, maɾaɾijaŋ aʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~uian, awaaj ko~u paɬ~ɮəpo~uʦan, pinaaj səmo~uʔo~utaj a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj ato~u finawɾan itira i fawaħan no~u tajpisi tiawʦaʦo~u~u mipaʦipat to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, mitəɾəŋ to~u kiɾaɬ~ɮo~um a miɾijaŋ. "po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kitakit a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj a kasakapo~ut" kaʡamisaj saʡətaɾ a kakəriɬ~ɮan ato~u tajwan ɬ~ɮajkako~u a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ "mitəɾəkaj to~u kimpo~u kasakapo~ut" a tamɬ~ɮaw ira tajra mikiħatija miʦikəro~uħ. saka to~usa ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, mitəka to~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ ko~u na ɬ~ɮəmak. kasa pitiɾiɬ~ɮan misatapaŋ a maʦo~uwat ko~u miɬ~ɮamaaj to~una o~unto~u, o~uja ħakasi no~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ nikapo~uɾo~uŋan mipaŋaŋan a mikətər to~u "masəɬ~ɮafaj faɾo~uʦo~uʡ miʦaɾiw to~u mapatajaj patiko~u to~u saɾo~uʡafaŋ", to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ saɾaɾo~umaʡan no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan, papo~utaɾaj no~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan ** ħakasi maɾaɾikiɬ~ɮ mipaŋaŋan to~u sapiʦo~ukər. ʦənsə, tajwan ħakasi jo~ufajo~uf, skakaaj kiŋkiwjin a kasakapo~ut mikiŋkiwaj, misətək to~u "mifəɾiħaj to~u so~ufitaj a piko~uwan" pakajraan, maɾakapo~ut to~u po~unkaan mapo~uɾo~uŋ miɾijaŋ. i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, "kapo~uɾo~uŋan miɾijaŋaj pikariʡaŋ no~u siʦian nikapo~uɾo~uŋan" a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, taɾifaħaɾ sa miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i ʦo~uŋʦənmiaw, ira ko~u mamo~uʔətəpaj a ħakasi tajra mipaɬ~ɮama. nika, ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk to~u ɾimaaj ko~u wiɬ~ɮi, mao~uʦo~ur ko~u iməŋ miɾapɾap, o~uja ʡaɾo~umanaj ʦa ʦħən sħiməŋ mataʡəɾifaj ko~u to~usa po~uɾo~uʡ a ħakasi mapəkpək no~u iməŋ. ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja sato~u, mio~uʦo~ur ħaʦa ko~u kmt to~u iməŋ matato~uj to~u sapəkpək a mipaɾo~u to~u ħakasi mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj. o~unini kinato~usaaj pipəkpək no~u iməŋ a ɬ~ɮəmakan, maɾəŋat a saŋo~utəfo~uħ sato~u ko~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sjakaj, makaʦifanaʡaj mipatirəŋ to~u "makafanaʡaj mifəɾiħ pikariʡaŋ no~u sib~vian nikapo~uɾo~uŋan", mikəto~un i saka *** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ a mirakataj a piɾijaŋ. ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, kasasikəɬ~ɮ rarawraw to~u ko~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan aɾaʡəʦaaj to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮ. ** a siŋsi no~u tsiŋ ħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u i ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "pakaniraaj ko~u pinanam, awaaj ko~u raraw no~u ħaratəŋ" sanaj pipatərəp pitiɾiɬ~ɮ a o~untio~u. i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, minʦintaŋ ato~u sinʦawɾiw ko~u mikəriɬ~ɮaj to~u sjakaj misətək to~u sapikapo~ut miɬ~ɮama. ʦi *ao~u miŋħo~u~ui itija i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ piħapiwan, miɾijas to~u miʦo~ukəraj tiawʦaʦi a to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ, nika ʦaaj to~u ko~u mamafasaw ko~unini ɾaɾəŋatan ɬ~ɮəmak. itija i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk * ko~u wiɬ~ɮi, o~u tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u "miʦo~ukəraj ʦi ɾiao~u wəiʦħəŋan" siŋsi mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u "po~uɾo~uŋan mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj sakapo~ut" a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw, taɾafaħaɾ sa ʦiɬ~ɮəmak miʦaɾap to~u sjataw no~u kaso~uɾiŋ no~u tajpisi, misatakaraw miʦikəro~uħ to~u piɾijaŋan, taŋasa i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ. itija ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin mitamo~uraj pasaɬ~ɮak to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "mitəfo~uʦ to~u mirarawaj təɾəkan (ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tijawɾi)" a anaɾaɾ, nika, itija ʦiɬ~ɮəmak ħaʦa ko~u miso~uɾapaj tajra i *iao~uto~uŋ ɬ~ɮajkako~u miħo~ukħo~ukaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, mapataraw ħaʦa ko~u piɾijaŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak, makəɬ~ɮəʦ aʦa ko~u *** pirakatan miɾijaŋ a paʡiʦəɾ. iko~ur i, taɬ~ɮamanaj ħakasi ʦa jo~u~u jiŋsħi, ɾi jo~u~uan*ħə, ɬ~ɮo~u~u wəimiŋ mikiħatija to~u pipaŋaŋan. o~u sapipaɾasawaɬ~ɮaw to~u ko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan, paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u misatəkəɬ~ɮaj a ɾatiiħ rikəʦ, ʦaajaj kaʦiraraw mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~uja * a kapaħ, miɾijas ko~u mikəɬ~ɮəʦaj to~u pitiɾiɬ~ɮan sanaj a saɾo~uŋo~uʦ a mirarakat, itija ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ira ko~u * ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮ no~u tamɬ~ɮaw ko~u mikiħatijaaj. o~u ɾifajin itija ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħajɬ~ɮa mipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "mitəfo~uʦ to~u mirarawaj təɾəkan (ʦənʦə panɾo~uan tijawɾi)" a anaɾaɾ, i ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħajɬ~ɮa paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "pitəfo~uʦ to~u səpaj təɾək". paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u, o~uja *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a sarikəʦ, pakajra ko~u ħo~ujin miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~unini a rikəʦ saki "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf" a anaɾaɾ sa * a mipako~uko~utan o~u nipaʦo~uro~uɬ~ɮan no~u kapo~uɾo~uŋan awaaj to~u ko~u pato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋan a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u.
